segments.text: Is that okay? Oh, I don't think that's what he wanted. Don't think he wanted that last jab.
However, yeah, you gotta watch the way he lands on his shield or potentially get spot dodged
because you know that outsmash could definitely ring true right now.
And now you have to fight through the neutral.
